title: Cute Mob Models: Resource Pack
description: This Resource Pack changes every mob models into cute anime mobs!
body:
![LOGO](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tomanex/Image-dumping/refs/heads/main/mods/cmm/gbL3GMJ%20(1).jpg)

## Support The Team
[![Discord Server](https://imgur.com/NvysTAe.png)](https://discord.com/invite/3qmMVa97eM)

**Twitter:** https://x.com/CuteMobTeam

# Overview
**Cute Mob Models RP** is a resource pack which replaces generic minecraft models with the designs used in the MobTalker mod. It's mostly just a visual change, though some options allow to change the mob's textures by using a name tag.

This is not a 1:1 recreation of the Cute Mob Models mod, as there are some limitations on OptiFine's CEM and we will build new things upon it.

### Recommended Sound Pack
**Cute Mob Models: Sound Pack** - by Sintful1: [Click Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cute-mob-models-sound-pack)

</details>

## Other Versions
* **[Cute Mob Models: Bedrock Edition](https://mcpedl.com/cute-mob-models/)** - by NGFuji.mp4
* **Cute Mob Models** - by Yarrmateys & _jx

## Installation
![Recommended Version List](https://imgur.com/bhnKxmk.png)

Recommended Version List is Here: [Click Here](https://www.notion.so/Recommended-Version-List-25e61c9cc86880bc9b21f69e89353a06?source=copy_link)

![How To Install](https://imgur.com/4wbV8Vn.png)

**Installation methods:**
OptiFine and ModLoaders (Fabric, Forge, Quilt)

**OptiFine method**: [Click here](https://prickly-crocus-d37.notion.site/OptiFine-version-563f524bd98e4b79b5aa2cf3cf7bcecb?pvs=4)

**ModLoader method**: [Click here](https://prickly-crocus-d37.notion.site/Fabric-Quilt-Forge-version-installation-bc3c792ec6ac404dbd53b33be6c67ecb?pvs=4)

![Name Tags](https://imgur.com/8f0TMqn.png)

Now mob's texture can be changed using the name tag: [Click here](https://www.notion.so/Name-Tag-25861c9cc8688077ae45fb09c4df9fd7?source=copy_link)

NOTE: If the resource pack is not working correctly, please check following settings.

```
"Video Settings ➔ Quality ➔ Custom Entity Models" ➔ ON.

"Video Settings ➔ Quality ➔ Random Entity" ➔ ON.

"Video Settings ➔ Animations ➔ Texture Animated" ➔ ON.
```

If this does not fix the issue, please do report them on our [discord server](https://discord.com/invite/3qmMVa97eM). preferably with some screenshots.

## Call for Collaboration

When uploading videos featuring Cute Mob Models, please help us find them easily by adding the hashtag #CuteMobModels to your posts.

### Additional suggestions:

You can also include a brief description of the video in your caption, highlighting the Cute Mob Models featured.
Tagging the Cute Mob Models Twitter Account ([@CuteMobTeam](https://x.com/CuteMobTeam)) can further increase visibility.

Engaging with other users who use the hashtag can help build a community around Cute Mob Models.
